text: How do I borrow a book?
description: 询问借书流程。需要什么证件、如何操作。
examples_json: [{"en":"Excuse me, how do I borrow a book from this library?","zh":"请问，怎么从图书馆借书？"}]

text: How long can I keep this book?
description: 询问借阅期限。通常 2-4 周。
examples_json: [{"en":"How long can I keep this book before returning it?","zh":"这本书能借多久？"}]

text: Can I borrow this with my student ID?
description: 确认借书所需证件。学生证通常就是借书证。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do I just need my student ID to borrow books?","zh":"我用学生证就能借书吗？"}]

text: I'd like to renew this book.
description: 续借的标准表达。renew = 续借。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to renew this book for another two weeks.","zh":"我想续借这本书两周。"}]

text: What's the late return fee?
description: 问逾期费用。late return / overdue。
examples_json: [{"en":"How much is the late return fee per day?","zh":"逾期费每天多少钱？"}]

text: I'm returning this book.
description: 还书的标准说法。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm returning these books. They're due today.","zh":"我来还这些书，今天到期。"}]

text: I'm looking for a book about...
description: 在图书馆查书。可以按主题/作者/书名。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm looking for a book about environmental science.","zh":"我在找一本关于环境科学的书。"}]

text: Can you help me find this journal?
meaning: 能帮我找到这本期刊吗？
description: 找期刊或论文。journal / article / paper。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you help me find this journal on the shelf?","zh":"能帮我在书架上找到这本期刊吗？"}]

text: How do I use the online catalogue?
description: 请求指导使用查询系统。catalogue = 目录。
examples_json: [{"en":"How do I search the online catalogue for books?","zh":"怎么在网上目录查书？"}]

text: What does your club do?
description: 了解社团基本信息。
examples_json: [{"en":"What does your club do? I'm interested in joining.","zh":"你们社团是做什么的？我有兴趣加入。"}]

text: How often do you meet?
description: 问活动频率。weekly / bi-weekly / monthly。
examples_json: [{"en":"How often do you meet? Is it every week?","zh":"你们多久活动一次？每周吗？"}]

text: How do I join?
description: 询问加入方式。是否需要报名表或面试。
examples_json: [{"en":"How do I join the club? Is there a registration form?","zh":"我该怎么加入？有报名表吗？"}]

text: Sounds interesting. I'd like to join.
meaning: 听起来很有意思，我想加入。
description: 表达加入意愿。
examples_json: [{"en":"Sounds interesting. I'd like to join. What do I need to do?","zh":"听起来很有意思，我想加入，需要做什么？"}]

text: When is the next meeting?
description: 询问活动安排。
examples_json: [{"en":"When is the next meeting? I'd like to come.","zh":"下次活动是什么时候？我想来。"}]

text: Can I bring a friend?
description: 问能否带非会员参加活动。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I bring a friend to the next meeting?","zh":"我能带朋友来参加下次活动吗？"}]

text: I'll have the... please.
description: 在食堂点餐。rice / noodles / chicken。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'll have the chicken with rice, please.","zh":"我要一份鸡肉饭。"}]

text: How much is this set meal?
description: 问价格。
examples_json: [{"en":"How much is this set meal?","zh":"这个套餐多少钱？"}]

text: What's today's special?
description: 问今日特色菜。
examples_json: [{"en":"What's today's special? I'd like to try it.","zh":"今日特供是什么？我想试试。"}]

text: Does this contain...?
description: 询问食材成分。meat / nuts / dairy。
examples_json: [{"en":"Does this dish contain any nuts or dairy?","zh":"这道菜含有坚果或乳制品吗？"}]

text: I'd like to top up my meal card.
description: 充值餐卡。top up = 充值。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to top up my meal card with 50 dollars.","zh":"我想给餐卡充值50美元。"}]

text: What's my current balance?
description: 查询余额。balance = 余额。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you check my current balance?","zh":"能查一下我卡上的余额吗？"}]

text: Can you tell me about this course?
meaning: 能给我介绍一下这门课吗？
description: 了解课程基本信息。内容、学分、老师。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you tell me about this course? What topics does it cover?","zh":"能给我介绍一下这门课吗？覆盖哪些主题？"}]

text: How is this course assessed?
description: 了解考核方式。exam / essay / project。
examples_json: [{"en":"How is this course assessed? Is it exam or coursework?","zh":"这门课怎么考核？考试还是作业？"}]

text: How do I register for this course?
description: 问选课操作流程。register / sign up / enroll。
examples_json: [{"en":"How do I register for this course online?","zh":"我怎样在网上注册这门课？"}]

text: When does registration open?
description: 问选课开始时间。registration period = 选课期。
examples_json: [{"en":"When does registration open for next semester?","zh":"下学期的选课什么时候开始？"}]

text: I'd like to drop this course.
description: 退课的标准表达。drop / withdraw。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to drop this course. What's the deadline?","zh":"我想退这门课，截止日期是什么时候？"}]

text: Can I switch to another section?
description: 换班/换 section。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I switch to the afternoon section instead?","zh":"我能换到下午的班吗？"}]
